title: Glasseam Glass Candle Holder Green: Candlestick Holders Set of 2 Taper Candle Holder Small Candle Holders for Candlestick Candles Ribbed Candle Stick Holder for Table Wedding Centrepiece Christmas
features: Cute Candle Stick Holders: These glass candle holders green feature a simple ribbed texture with elegant design, they are classic and chic enough to dress up your dining table, perfect for any standard sized short or long candle sticks, chime candles, Advent or Shabbat candles and flameless candles

Thick Glass Candle Stick Holder: These candleholders with smooth fluted texture have a nice weight to them, sturdy, solid and durable for all year round. They have enough weighted wide base on them to prevent accidental tipping, and the candle can sit properly in them having a sleek look.

Minimal Yet Stylish: These glass candlesticks are ideal for completing to a variety of decorative styles. They fancy enough as a part of the centerpiece to add a modern, rustic, boho or vintage touch to your dinning table, and simutaneously highlight the elegant simplicity of all types and colors of taper candles, adding a welcoming ambiance to tables.

Value Meets Beauty: This dinner candle holder is not only a basic small candle holder for formal dinners, but also aesthetic decorative taper candle holders glass for casual use at daily. They shall instantly brighten up your dinner tables, fireplace mantle, living room, bathroom, and they are holiday safety candle holders set for Christmas, Halloween, Advent, Thanksgiving, and further make great gifts or adorable favors for wedding, birthday party, baby shower and anniversary.

Glasseam Vintage Candle Holder for Your Satisfaction: Engaged in glassware for years, Glasseam aims to provide you with an Christmas candle holder in perfect condition with customized packaging. Please tell us if you are unsatisfied with the item for any reason. We are always listening, and will provide the best and the most professional customer service for you.
